Interrupt Enable

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x2000
Size:
0x4
Array Dimensions:
[4]
Array Stride:
+0x4
Total Size:
0x10
Source:
plic_rf.rdl

Description

Enable bits for global interrupts routed to Hart 0 M-Mode. Bit N of register K enables interrupt source ID (K*32 + N). Bit 0 of enable[0] is hardwired to 0 (ID 0 unused).

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] enable rw - Enable
